span.p: HARNESS H = (E, T, C, S, L, V) — everything we evolve
BRAIN — frozen, never fine-tuned, no GPU

NL question
(How many customers in Mumbai?)

span.p:
C · Context manager
schema + retrieved skills -> the prompt

span.p:
T · Tool registry
run_sql: execute against the DB

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
E · Execution loop
generate -> run -> observe -> retry

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
S · State store
skill / memory library

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
L · Lifecycle hooks
validation gates: what to keep / when to stop

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
V · Evaluation interface
score_sql: execution-match reward
